apigateway.domainname.mutualtlsauthentic.Description: An Amazon S3 URL that specifies the truststore for mutual TLS authentication, for example, `s3://bucket-name/key-name`. The truststore can contain certificates from public or private certificate authorities. To update the truststore, upload a new version to S3, and then update your custom domain name to use the new version. To update the truststore, you must have permissions to access the S3 object.
The version of the S3 object that contains your truststore. To specify a version, you must have versioning enabled for the S3 bucket.
